name: sidecar
description: Call any OpenRouter-hosted LLM (Gemini, GPT, DeepSeek, Grok, etc.) as a Claude CLI subagent. Runs a vendored local proxy that translates Anthropic API <-> OpenAI chat-completions format, so claude -p can route to non-Anthropic models cleanly. Fork & Fold features: per-call model override, parallel multi-model compare, session continuity (--continue), structured fold blocks, read-only subagents by default, and cost visibility (per-ask history, $/M pricing, credit check). Includes parent-conversation transcript access so subagents can self-pull context when relevant.
